name: Spicy Zucchini Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat batter at medium speed of an electric mixer until creamy.
2. Gradually beat in the sugar.
3. Beat in egg and almond extract.
4. Press zucchini between paper towels to remove excess moisture, then stir into butter mixture.
5. Combine flour, baking powder, and cinnamon; gradually add to butter mixture, beating at low speed until well blended.
6. Stir in chocolate morsels and nuts.
7. Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes. Remove to a wire rack to cool.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Yield: 5 dozen.
